title: Axus Decor Caulking Gun - for C3/310ml and C4/400ml Cartridges - Heavy Duty Sealant Gun with Ladder Hook and Finger Contoured Grip - for Professional & DIY Enthusiasts, Red
features: BUILT TO LAST: The silicone gun is made from sturdy steel for maximum durability and reliability. It withstands the toughest jobs, ensuring your caulk gun remains reliable for all your sealing and filling tasks.
EASY STORAGE: This caulk gun is designed with a ladder hook that offers a practical storage solution and easy accessibility. You no longer have to struggle to keep your caulk gun nearby during work.
COMFORTABLE GRIP: This caulk gun features a finger-contoured grip that provides exceptional comfort and control. Maintain a firm grasp even during extended applications, ensuring precise results.

HIGH CARTRIDGE CAPACITY: This caulk gun can hold up to a 400ml cartridge, the perfect tool for tackling larger projects. You do not need to constant refilling and complete your tasks faster and more efficiently.

VERSATILE APPLICATION: This silicone sealant gun is perfect for professional contractors and DIY enthusiasts, as it can be used to apply decorators' caulk, sealants, mastic, silicone, adhesives, and fillers.
